name: Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter Marseille Soap 10l
description: Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter Marseille Soap offers superior cleanliness and freshness for your cat’s litter box. Made from 100% natural, non-toxic bentonite clay, this premium litter delivers instant clumping, excellent odor control, and long-lasting freshness with a soothing Marseille soap scent. Perfect for single or multi-cat households, it provides a safe and hygienic solution that makes litter maintenance effortless. Key Features 100% Natural Bentonite: Made from high-quality natural clay, completely free from harmful chemicals and additives. Instant Clumping Action: Quickly forms firm clumps upon contact with liquid, locking in moisture and odors for easy daily cleaning. Fresh Marseille Soap Scent: Keeps your home smelling clean with a light, refreshing fragrance that neutralizes unpleasant odors. Fine Grain Texture: Ensures superior absorbency and easy scooping, reducing waste and mess. Prevents Bacterial Growth: Inhibits bacteria formation in the litter box to promote a healthy, hygienic space for your cat. Low Dust Formula: Minimizes dust for cleaner handling and a safer environment for both cats and humans. Non-Toxic & Safe: Gentle on paws and suitable for all cats — even in homes with children or sensitive pets. Usage Instructions Setup: Fill your cat’s litter box with approximately 7–8 cm of litter. Daily Maintenance: Scoop out clumps and solid waste daily to maintain cleanliness and freshness. Refill: Add fresh litter regularly to maintain the recommended depth and performance. Transition Tip: When switching to Proline, mix new litter with your old brand for a few days to help your cat adjust. Hygiene: Wash hands thoroughly after cleaning to reduce exposure to bacteria or parasites (e.g., Toxoplasma gondii ). Storage Information Store in a cool, dry place , away from direct sunlight and moisture. Keep the package tightly sealed after each use to preserve freshness and prevent contamination. Benefits Keeps your cat’s litter box fresh, dry, and odor-free . Reduces maintenance with quick and easy clumping . Promotes a hygienic, dust-minimized environment for your cat and home. Ideal for multi-cat households needing fast absorption and effective odor control.
